description: DeBERTa-v3-base (184M) + 30 MI-selected linguistic features via attention fusion. Trained on HC3Plus + M4 + MAGE + RAID-none + all 11 RAID attack types (~767K samples, 50/50 balanced). Unicode v2 preprocessing. ConPara training methodology.
authors: Mohamed Mady (TUM / OTH Regensburg / Imperial College London)
